calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Tuttle of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiff Whitney Leeman.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Whitney Leeman's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Enter Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement is in compliance with the requirements of Proposition 65. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)
